conviction_board.name: Bajaj Auto
conviction_board.narrative: BAJAJ-AUTO scores 45/100 on our engine. Directionless. Neither bulls nor bears have control, and that won't change without a catalyst. The momentum profile is constructive. RSI at 66 means the move is early-to-mid phase, not late innings. The tape is chopping sideways with 48% breadth. Stock-picking matters more than market direction here. Automobiles is lagging the broader tape (score 25) — an extra headwind. Range-bound between ₹10,022 and ₹10,579. Patience over conviction. Verdict: HOLD. Own it? Let it work. Don't own it? Cleaner entries exist elsewhere. Outlook: Neutral → Neutral → Neutral.
